name: Cajun Catfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the fish fillets and pat dry.
2. In a bowl mix the ground wheat flakes and all the seasonings. Dip the fillets into the seasoning, coating both sides.
3. Heat oil in a heavy cast iron fry pan. Fry the fillets for 2 minutes on each side. Lay the fillets on a plate lined with paper towel, cover with another paper towel, and pat to remove excess oil.
